title: Deep Drill Enchant
description: This adds a new enchantment that allows you to insta-break all deepslate block but can no longer break any other block
body:
# Deep Drill Enchant
Heyy, this is a simple datapack that adds a new enchantment which allows you to mine all deepslate blocks instantly but can no longer work for any other block.
<details>
<summary>1.21</summary>
  
## How does it work
Simple, you break blocks but what does this enchantment actually do?
- It allows you to **insta-break all deepslate blocks**
- Any other block is not mineable anymore
- If it was an ore that gave xp, it will always give 1xp for each block
- This enchantment is **exclusive to all pickaxe enchantment apart from Mending**, meaning that Fortune, Silk Touch, Efficiency and even unbreaking can not be combine with it.
- The broken blocks do not count in your stats because you technically didn't break it


## How to obtain the enchantment
The enchantment can not be found in the enchanting table nor can it be found with villager trading. It only apears in the **ancient cities chests**.

</details>


## Important message
This datapack is the start of a new project of mine which will include more enchants. Don't hesitate to share any feedback you have

**All my datapacks are compatible**

**You can modify this datapack to your likings. However, I would appreciate if you could credit me if you use my base code, thank you!**

## Planned in the future: The higher on the list, the sooner
- Configuration menu in game
